title: IncludeScript Library Editor
text: IncludeScript Library Editor Use the IncludeScript Library Editor to create and edit IncludeScript objects, and edit the properties of the library itself. Worksheets Define Structure—create new IncludeScript objects and edit their properties. Write Script—write the code for the IncludeScript. How to Create an IncludeScript Using the Uniface IDE Working with Development Objects Related Links IncludeScript Library An IncludeScript Library contains IncludeScript objects, which can be inserted into ProcScript using the #include directive and are resolved during compilation. IncludeScript An IncludeScript is a Development Object that defines a fragment of script that can be inserted into ProcScript using the #include directive. Libraries Libraries are collections of objects that can be shared in some way, either during development, or at runtime. They are main development objects, so whenever they are saved or exported, all the objects that they contain are included. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
